## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync to discuss HeyGen's content strategy, blog updates, and tool directory progress.](https://fathom.video/share/ycnDg8e3rD_SH9HanCpR4kTCMmRdM-vp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [E-learning blog posts are ready for publication; future posts will use programmatically generated thumbnails](https://fathom.video/share/ycnDg8e3rD_SH9HanCpR4kTCMmRdM-vp?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [API product launch next week requires rapid development of use cases, guides, and marketing content](https://fathom.video/share/ycnDg8e3rD_SH9HanCpR4kTCMmRdM-vp?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)
  - [Tool directory content is ready for review; team to start populating templates in parallel with remaining development](https://fathom.video/share/ycnDg8e3rD_SH9HanCpR4kTCMmRdM-vp?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Collaboration opportunities identified with HubSpot, Reddit, and Ramp for content creation and backlinks](https://fathom.video/share/ycnDg8e3rD_SH9HanCpR4kTCMmRdM-vp?tab=summary&timestamp=119.0)

## Topics

### Blog Content and Publishing

  - [Design team working on a thumbnail template for thought leadership posts](https://fathom.video/share/ycnDg8e3rD_SH9HanCpR4kTCMmRdM-vp?tab=summary&timestamp=430.0)
  - [Three e-learning blog posts ready for this week; PEPSpot content localization post planned for next Monday](https://fathom.video/share/ycnDg8e3rD_SH9HanCpR4kTCMmRdM-vp?tab=summary&timestamp=1515.0)
